programme.sub-title: S02 : E29 Diesel Engines
programme.desc: It's all about Diesel this time. We compared the BMW 120d and the 125i. In addition: Audi's diesel-hybrid model R18 e-tron quattro dominated the endurance race in Le Mans. And: the diesel-powered Jaguar XF Sport Brake.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Ford Mustang vs Chevy Corvette
programme.desc: Car lovers from the Middle East present their vehicles at the Sofitel Dubai Jumeirah Beach. There is a weekend at the hotel to be won. A Ford Mustang and a limited edition Chevrolet Corvette are up for judging this time.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Nova SS vs Honda Accord
programme.desc: On Put Your Car On TV, car fans from the Middle East can have their darlings rated in terms of speed, style and sound. Included this time: a Nova SS, a special Honda Accord and a car clad in crystals.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E141 Jaguar RS
programme.desc: Jaguar succeeded in finding new confidence and challenging their competitors with models like the XF-RS, XK-RS and F-Type. We took a look at the iconic British brand's latest developments.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E133 Blancpain Endurance Series 2013
programme.desc: The Blancpain Endurance Series is a racing event for grand tourers like the Ferrari 458 Italia, the McLaren MP4-12 C or the Nissan GT-R Nismo GT3. We took a look at all the action, the drivers, their cars at the 2013 competition.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Episode 11
programme.desc: Spring finally melted away the snow on the track and racing life returned to the Nuerburgring. Drivers with gasoline in their veins started chasing their cars around the ring again.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Episode 16
programme.desc: In this episode we invite you to witness the progress of driver Uwe Nittle as he got ready for qualifying at the Truck Grand Prix.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Bike Crash
programme.desc: This time the team deals with motorbike stunts: high jumps, risky drops and dangerous crashes in the company's backyard. Stunt coordinator Domi requires his specialists to be in top shape and extremely focused.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 The Graduate
programme.desc: A vehicle jumps at full speed over four cars, which explode one after the other. It’s a matter of precision and timing for the Stunt Heroes. Also, up-and-coming stuntwoman Tina has to prove her skills.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Lexus GSF vs McLaren MP4-12C
programme.desc: The competition for the coolest souped-up cars in the Middle East continues. The prize is an overnight stay for two at the Sofitel Jumeirah Beach. This time, the spotlight is on a Lexus GSF, a Ford Mustang and a McLaren MP4-12C.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Mercedes SLS vs Audi R8
programme.desc: Mylene Gomera and Saif Hattawi once again invite the owners of the most extraordinary cars to Dubai, where they award points for speed, style and sound. This time, they will be joined by a limited edition Mercedes SLS and an Audi R8.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E83 Ferrari Testarossa
programme.desc: The Ferrari Testarossa is a dream car, but the 1000 PS Lotec Testarossa is even better and faster. Also: the Porsche Panamera GTS is basically a race car. And: the Wiesmann MF3 is retired with a final edition.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E93 Morgan Plus 8
programme.desc: The second generation of the BMW M6, a dream car between sports car and luxury. Also: with the C-X75, the Jaguar shows how the dynamic future could look like. And: after eight years the Morgan Plus 8 is back.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E31 Women and their Classic Cars
programme.desc: A small group of car enthusiastic ladies offers resistance in the otherwise man dominated classic car world. One of them is Johanna. The 24-year-old loves her 1969 Corvette more than everything.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E38 Scrapyard Gold
programme.desc: It is not too unusual to find hidden gems of automotive history in a perfect condition in barns or scrap yards. Also: the MGC GT Sebring, that was built for the 12 Hours of Sebring race.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 Tuning World
programme.desc: For more than 20 years the Tuning World Bodensee has been one of the top events in the European car tuning scene. Also: with their i-models BMW started to explore alternative drive technologies. And: taking the Nissan Leaf to Oslo.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 All New!
programme.desc: Following the Porsche 911's anniversary we take a look back at this iconic model's history. Also: the world's first series-produced plug-in hybrid with a diesel engine, the Volvo V60. And: safety measures in the car world, from seatbelts to crash tests.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E200 High Society
programme.desc: Rolls-Royce and Bentley are the ultimate upper class status symbols. Those who prefer a sportier approach can choose from a great range of brands like Bugatti, Ferrari, Lamborghini, Porsche and McLaren that compete for the title of best sports car.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E181 Supercars on the Rocks
programme.desc: Nissan's all-wheel monster GT-R had to prove its winter suitability and the new Porsche 911 with turbo engine was taken to its limits in Finnish Lapland. Also: the Mercedes-Benz S 500 plug-in hybrid.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 The Graduate
programme.desc: A vehicle jumps at full speed over four cars, which explode one after the other. It’s a matter of precision and timing for the Stunt Heroes. Also, up-and-coming stuntwoman Tina has to prove her skills.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 The Very First Time
programme.desc: The team is shooting a car rollover. Stunt coordinator Carl wants to go all out. He adds an exciting shootout to the mix. Also, he has a surprise for his boss. During the rollover he wants him to sit in the passenger seat, for the very first time.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 Episode 22
programme.desc: At the Nuerburgring Patrick chased a 12-cylinder Aston Martin Zagato down the track. Also on the show: a Hummer, a Renault Clio and a Frenchman in a Ferrari.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Episode 16
programme.desc: In this episode we invite you to witness the progress of driver Uwe Nittle as he got ready for qualifying at the Truck Grand Prix.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E180 High Performance
programme.desc: The German company Performmaster upgraded the Mercedes C63 AMG S, chip tuning from the Racechip company gave the Porsche Macan Turbo even more bite and Kellener did their take on the BMW 640i.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E99 AMG
programme.desc: The letters AMG sound rather magical in the ears of car enthusiasts. We took a look at some of the company's construction and racing history, their recent creations like the ML 63 SUV, as well as their "Black Series" range of vehicles.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E199 Sedan Offensive
programme.desc: The Volvo S90 offers Scandinavian elegance and a high level of security features. Jaguar entered the race with its performance sedan XF-S and Cadillac ramped up their luxury level with the CT6.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E29 Enduro Park Hechlingen
programme.desc: The BMW Enduro Park Hechlingen in Bavaria offers off-road driving pleasure both for beginners and pros alike on 26 hectares. We take a look at what this exciting place has to offer for enduro enthusiasts. Also: what does the inexpensive Hyosung ST 700 i from South Korea have to offer? And: the big-wheeled scooter from Taiwan, the Kymco People GT 300i.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E30 Triumph Thunderbird
programme.desc: The parallel twin-cylinder Triumph Thunderbird. Is the powerful 1.6 litre bike able to gain a foothold outside of the British Isles? Also: Harley-Davidson's black chopper Sportster 883 Iron, a starter bike for purists. And: Bike & Music, a spectacle for motorbike and stunt enthusiasts at Europe's biggest motorway rest area in Geiselwind, Germany.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 Episode 20
programme.desc: At the old-timer grand prix at the Nuerburgring you for example can see the Mercedes S with 160 horsepower that lead Rudolf Caracciola to victory in the 1927 opening race.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 Episode 18
programme.desc: After the 24-hour race was over we left the Nuerburgring and moved to Büren, Germany, where the Raeder Motorsport company is based. They are famous for front-wheel drives with a great performance that put a lot of horsepower to the track.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E78 Iconic Racing Classics
programme.desc: Cars like the Ford GT 40, the Jaguar D-Type or the Mercedes 300 SL wrote history on the race track and now break records at auctions. A sumptuously restored 300 SL will start at the most famous classic car rally in the world, the Mille Miglia.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E82 Saalbach Classic 2014
programme.desc: At the 2014 Saalbach Classic rally 80 teams raced their automobile rarities through the Austrian Alps. In addition: rally legend Walter Röhrl in a Porsche 911 RSR at the Cologne-Ahrweiler rally. And: the infamous Group B vehicle category.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E37 Offroad for Everybody
programme.desc: Opel's Insignia Tourer Country was the German brand's first family car in outdoor attire. In addition: with the Capture Renault presented their first compact SUV. And: what happens when Fiat's cute compact 500 is inflated to the 500L Trekking?

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E51 Open Air Concert
programme.desc: As an homage to driving top-down we took a look at three of the most beautiful convertibles. The animalistic sound of the Audi S3 convertible's 4-cylinder is astonishing. But what about the Nissan 370 Z Roadster? Or Porsche's Boxster GTS?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E130 Muscle Cars
programme.desc: For more than 60 years the Corvette has been the embodiment of the American sports car. Also: the Ford Mustang GT, an iconic model with a V8 engine at the price of a Volkswagen Passat. And: the Chevrolet Camaro, another classic from the US.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E199 Sedan Offensive
programme.desc: The Volvo S90 offers Scandinavian elegance and a high level of security features. Jaguar entered the race with its performance sedan XF-S and Cadillac ramped up their luxury level with the CT6.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 The Ten Slowest Cars
programme.desc: Cars are often defined by their speed, but we chose to decelerate things and take a look at our top 10 selection of the most sluggish cars.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 The Ten Most Fuel-efficient Cars
programme.desc: Not everyone can afford to pay vast sums of money for fuel. We present our top 10 most economical cars in terms of fuel consumption.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S02 : E24 Jump'n Crash
programme.desc: In this episode of Stunt Heroes, it's all about stunt driver Christoph Knobloch. He drives down a ramp and crashes into cars stacked on top of each other while several petrol barrels explode at the same time.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Highfall
programme.desc: The Stunt Heroes reveal how spectacular car stunts with big explosions are prepared and which tricks are pulled when you have to blow up a car or jump from a high-rise building.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E94 Audi at Le Mans
programme.desc: At the 2012 Le Mans 24 Hours, Audi entered the R18 e-tron quattro for the first time. Also: the Porsche Cayenne GTS, the model between the S and the Turbo. And: the Mercedes-Benz CLS Shooting Brake.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E79 Infinity FX50
programme.desc: The evolutionary history of the Infinity FX50, Sebastian Vettel Edition. Also: the Porsche GT2 RS, the most expensive and fastest serial 911 of all times. And: the McLaren MP4 12C GT3, one of the fastest cars in the world.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E176 Lamborghini Fascination
programme.desc: Even in the world of super sports cars people get goose bumps if they hear the name Lamborghini. Wherever they’re spotted, the Huracan and the Aventador always receive lots of attention.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 The Greatest Car Legends
programme.desc: There are very special car models that remain in the collective memory for decades and generations. We take a look at the ten most legendary cars.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 The Strangest Cars
programme.desc: With some cars, you wonder what the designers and manufacturers were thinking. We present what we consider to be the most bizarre cars.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E159 Luxury 2.0
programme.desc: Lexus was one of the pioneers when it comes to electric and hybrid cars. The brand's LS 600h, the BMW Active Hybrid 7 and the Porsche Panamera S E-Hybrid are prime examples of this mixture between combustion and electric propulsion.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E127 First Class for High Income
programme.desc: Audi's coupe RS7 Sportback skillfully combines luxury and power whereas Mercedes' S-Class has always been regarded as a benchmark in the luxury segment. In addition: Abt Sportsline took four of their models to the Festival of Speed in Goodwood, England.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E61 Classic Cars with All-Wheel Drive
programme.desc: The Volkswagen Type 166 amphibious vehicle is the all-rounder amongst off-road vehicles. Also: the Peugeot 205 Turbo 16 all-wheeler turned the World Rally Championship in the 1980s on its head. And : the Willys Jeep in our drive report.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E71 Mobility in Eastern Europe
programme.desc: In the 1950s, companies like Tatra from Czechoslovakia introduced advanced, even pioneering automobiles. The clientele was exclusive, which is why now these streamlined cars are big rarities. We tracked down the owner of a 1937 Tatra T87.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E33 Sportscars for the Masses
programme.desc: The Ford Mustang has been an icon for decades. What makes this car so special? In addition: the Nissan 370 Z Nismo is half as expensive as a Porsche 911, but its power is on par with the German flagship. And: the 7th generation Volkswagen Golf GTI and R.

programme.sub-title: S09 : E04 Best Fails of the Month | Ep. 9.4
programme.desc: The best of the worst for April '26.

JCB Digitron’s Tristan England looks for his first overall event win of the season, while Tom Meents looks to add to his legacy as the all-time winningest driver at Houston’s NRG Stadium.

programme.title: Championship Series

programme.title: Arena in 30
programme.sub-title: S2023 : E14 Pinnacle Bank Arena - Lincoln, NE
programme.desc: Grave Digger’s Krysten Anderson looks to stay in the hunt for the series title as Arena Championship Series West heads to Lincoln, Nebraska. Earth Shaker’s Tristan England and El Toro Loco’s Elvis Lainez attempt to keep the black and green wrecking machine from winning the event championship when Monster Jam roars into Pinnacle Bank Arena.

programme.title: Championship Series
programme.sub-title: S2021 : E12 Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL

programme.title: Monster Jam Fast Track
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Angel Stadium - Anaheim, CA
programme.desc: Monster Jam returns to Angel Stadium in Anaheim for a high-octane round of Stadium Championship Series West. Rivalries ignite as top-ranked racers like Tyler Menninga in Grave Digger and Cole Venard in Black Pearl battle for dominance in intense, tire-to-tire photo finishes. Experience the roar of the crowd and the relentless energy of a phenomenon that is trending across the world.

programme.title: Monster Jam Fast Track
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Echo Park Speedway, Atlanta, GA
programme.desc: Monster Jam heads to Georgia for an "old school" battle as the Stadium Championship Series East takes over Echo Park Speedway in Atlanta. Watch as twelve elite teams go head-to-head in high-stakes JCB Racing, featuring intense matchups between veterans like Jim Koehler and rising stars like Tristan England.

programme.title: Best of Monster Jam
programme.sub-title: S2025 : E24 Muddy Monster Jam Trucks Compilation
programme.desc: There’s no other monster truck competition in the world like the one and only Monster Jam.

programme.title: Championship Series
programme.sub-title: S2016 : E04 Lucas Oil Stadium - Indianapolis, IN
programme.desc: Monster Jam has arrived in what is considered to be the motor sports capitol of the world, Indianapolis, Indiana.

programme.title: Monster Jam LIVE
programme.sub-title: S2026 : E11 LIVE: Monster Jam World Finals Selection Show - 5/11/2026
programme.desc: The road to the Monster Jam World Finals starts here! Tune in LIVE as the top Monster Jam drivers learn if they’ve earned a spot in the 2026 Monster Jam World Finals. Don’t miss the official selection reveal, surprises, and exclusive moments leading into the biggest event in Monster Jam.

programme.title: Monster Jam Fast Track
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 loanDepot Park - Miami, FL
programme.desc: The dirt is ready and the engines are roaring as Monster Jam takes over loanDepot park in Miami for a high-stakes Round 8. Witness the raw power and fearless competition of the Stadium Championship Series East as drivers battle across three intense stages: JCB Racing, the Skills Challenge, and Freestyle. Rivals like Adam Anderson and Tristan England look to defend their dominance, while fierce competitors like Jamie Sullivan and Chris Koehler push their 1,500-horsepower machines to the absolute edge to claim the BKT overall event championship. Don't miss a second of the gravity-defying stunts and heart-pounding action in this electric stadium environment.

programme.title: Monster Jam TV
programme.sub-title: S2014 : E12 Ford Field - Detroit, MI
programme.desc: Monster Jam's 2014 season zooms into Ford Field in Detroit, MI with more fun!

programme.title: Championship Series
programme.sub-title: S2009 : E06 Angel Stadium - Anaheim, CA - Freestyle
programme.desc: Monster Jam's 2009 season continues with epic freestyle action from Angel Stadium of Anaheim, on January 10, 2009.

programme.title: Championship Series
programme.sub-title: S2015 : E19 Gillette Stadium - Foxborough, MA - Racing
programme.desc: Don't miss the thrilling Monster Jam racing action from Gillette Stadium on June 20, 2015!

programme.title: Monster Jam Fast Track
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 AT&T Stadium - Arlington, TX
programme.desc: Experience the high-octane intensity as Round 6 of Monster Jam Fast Track takes over the iconic AT&T Stadium in Arlington, Texas. Watch as 12 world-class athletes, including icons like Tristan England in JCB Digatron and Adam Anderson in Grave Digger, push their 12,000-pound machines to the limit across three grueling competitions. The stakes are higher than ever in the JCB Racing bracket, where mechanical drama—like smoke pouring from Mike Pagliarulo’s Excalibur—threatens to derail championship dreams. From the technical precision of the Skills Challenge to the gravity-defying backflips of Freestyle, the "Home of the Dallas Cowboys" provides the ultimate stage for raw power and fearless...

Find out when Monster Jam heads back to Houston for Round 6.

programme.title: Championship Series
programme.sub-title: S2024 : E12 Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL

Former Rookie of the Year, Nick Pagliarulo returns to Kraken for his series premiere as Stadium Championship Series East heads to Tampa.

programme.desc: When Sun Mei and Red vanish, the group must decide whether to keep looking for them or press on to Newmerica.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S04 : E05 Z Nation
programme.desc: The team is captured and enslaved in an elaborate underground facility, forced by their mysterious captors to perform a series of bizarre and dangerous tasks.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S04 : E06 Z Nation
programme.desc: Lucy fights to save Murphy's life, while Warren and the others battle a biologically modified zombie.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S04 : E07 Z Nation
programme.desc: Shaken by the death a groupmate, something snaps in Murphy. Warren is unable to stop him and the others from committing an atrocity as misplaced revenge.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S04 : E08 Z Nation
programme.desc: Warren and the group encounter a mysterious stranger who they think is a grave robber - but turns out to be something much more.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S04 : E10 Z Nation
programme.desc: In Chicago, Doc and Murphy encounter a mysterious - and murderous - group, including Sketchy and Skeezy.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S04 : E11 Z Nation
programme.desc: The group returns to Mercy Labs, where they first met The Man, to retrieve another item from Warren's dreams.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S04 : E12 Z Nation
programme.desc: At Mount Weather, the group learns the thumb print of the president is necessary to achieve Warren's goal.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S04 : E13 Z Nation
programme.desc: In the mind-bending season finale, the team arrives in Washington, D.C. and the secret of Warren's dreams is revealed.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S05 : E01 Z Nation
programme.desc: Following the drone crash, Warren is nursed back to health by attractive homesteader Cooper. Meanwhile, the others finally reach Newmerica, and Murphy goes his own way.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S05 : E03 Z Nation
programme.desc: Panic and anti-talker sentiments flare after an explosion derails the vote - and rumors blame a talker. 10K, Sarge and Red are attacked by old-school zombies and suffer devastating losses, and Murphy finds his loyal blends are still out there.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S05 : E04 Z Nation
programme.desc: 10K and Red attend a ceremony for those lost in Altura. Warren, Doc, Citizen Z and George arrive in Pacifica.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S05 : E05 Z Nation
programme.desc: A new spate of terrorist bombings hit Pacifica. In order to follow his vision for human-talker unity, George seeks those responsible for the attacks.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S05 : E06 Z Nation
programme.desc: Warren and the group wind up at a wild casino and shelter for fugitive talkers run by Murphy and his blends.
